principle: The working app is the demonstration. Agents perform routing and specialist work behind one user-facing intake.

steps.objective: Harden runtime report context and preserve selected pathway state.
Remove demo-first components, sample case data, and presentation mode from the live application path.
Make the single intake route user questions, plans, photos, standards lookup, evidence, assessment, and report pathways through agents.
Make photo upload create evidence records with metadata and route through the Image DNA Agent.
Make plan upload create plan records and route through the Plan Review Agent.
Add source-controlled standards lookup that returns references without unsupported conclusions.
